tasks_cancel_reason_required.name: tasks_cancel_reason_required
tasks_cancel_reason_required.value: status <> 'cancelled' OR cancel_reason IS NOT NULL

tasks_canceller_xor.name: tasks_canceller_xor
tasks_canceller_xor.value: status <> 'cancelled' OR (cancelled_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (cancelled_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)

tasks_imposer_xor.name: tasks_imposer_xor
tasks_imposer_xor.value: (imposed_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (imposed_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)
